My Story

I am an IT Network Support Engineer based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India, with a Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) in Information Technology from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, and CCNA Networking training from Sansbound School, Chennai. I have hands-on experience in network administration, IT infrastructure, technical support, and system maintenance, with a strong focus on delivering reliable and efficient technology solutions.

My professional journey began in Chennai as a Technical Support Executive at Sriram Value Added Services, where I developed a solid foundation in technical troubleshooting, customer support, and IT service delivery. I later expanded my professional experience internationally by joining Al Sharah LLC in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, as a Sales & Service Executive, strengthening my customer relationship management, technical problem-solving, and communication skills in a multicultural environment.

Currently, I serve as an IT Network Support Engineer at DEXIT Global Limited in Coimbatore, where I manage network administration, IT infrastructure, system maintenance, end-user support, and the technical execution of Government Examination Operations. My responsibilities include ensuring the stability, security, and availability of IT systems while supporting mission-critical operations with efficiency and reliability.

I am passionate about networking, IT infrastructure, and emerging technologies, and I continuously strive to expand my technical knowledge and stay current with industry advancements. I am committed to delivering secure, scalable, and high-quality technology solutions while contributing to organizational growth through professionalism, continuous learning, and a proactive approach to problem-solving.
